title: Bomb disposal squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Police Scotland said it received a report of a "suspicious item" found at the base around 11:25am on Thursday

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Bomb disposal squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth Police closed off roads leading to RAF Lossiemouth (Image: Peter Jolly)

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: This article is brought to you by our exclusive subscriber partnership with our sister title USA Today, and has been written by our American colleagues. It does not necessarily reflect the view of The Herald. A bomb disposal squad has detonated a suspicious package in a controlled explosion at RAF Lossiemouth.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Bomb disposal squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth
